'''âr-dh-v''' ('''karadhav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectorize|vectorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectorize|vectorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-dh-v
|-
! Lemma
| karadhav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiradhav|thiradhav]] || [[word:jiradhav|jiradhav]] || [[word:shiradhav|shiradhav]] || [[word:kiradhav|kiradhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuradhav|thuthuradhav]] || [[word:jujuradhav|jujuradhav]] || [[word:shushuradhav|shushuradhav]] || [[word:kukuradhav|kukuradhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuradhav|thuradhav]] || [[word:juradhav|juradhav]] || [[word:shuradhav|shuradhav]] || [[word:kuradhav|kuradhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuradhav|thuradhav]] || [[word:juradhav|juradhav]] || [[word:shuradhav|shuradhav]] || [[word:kuradhav|kuradhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theradhav|theradhav]] || [[word:jeradhav|jeradhav]] || [[word:sheradhav|sheradhav]] || [[word:keradhav|keradhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoradhav|thothoradhav]] || [[word:jojoradhav|jojoradhav]] || [[word:shoshoradhav|shoshoradhav]] || [[word:kokoradhav|kokoradhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoradhav|thoradhav]] || [[word:joradhav|joradhav]] || [[word:shoradhav|shoradhav]] || [[word:koradhav|koradhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoradhav|thoradhav]] || [[word:joradhav|joradhav]] || [[word:shoradhav|shoradhav]] || [[word:koradhav|koradhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠradhav|thĂŠradhav]] || [[word:jĂŠradhav|jĂŠradhav]] || [[word:shĂŠradhav|shĂŠradhav]] || [[word:kĂŠradhav|kĂŠradhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharadhav|thatharadhav]] || [[word:jajaradhav|jajaradhav]] || [[word:shasharadhav|shasharadhav]] || [[word:kakaradhav|kakaradhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharadhav|tharadhav]] || [[word:jaradhav|jaradhav]] || [[word:sharadhav|sharadhav]] || [[word:karadhav|karadhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharadhav|tharadhav]] || [[word:jaradhav|jaradhav]] || [[word:sharadhav|sharadhav]] || [[word:karadhav|karadhav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharadhav|sharadhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharadhav|gosharadhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharadhav|gokisharadhav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharadhavnĂŒ|sharadhavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharadhavnknĂŒ|gosharadhavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadhavnĂŒ|gokisharadhavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharadhavshĂ«|sharadhavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkshĂ«|gosharadhavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharadhavshĂ«|gokisharadhavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadhavro|sharadhavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkro|gosharadhavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadhavro|gokisharadhavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadhavmu|sharadhavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkmu|gosharadhavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadhavmu|gokisharadhavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharadhavsher|sharadhavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharadhavnksher|gosharadhavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharadhavsher|gokisharadhavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharadhavng|sharadhavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkng|gosharadhavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharadhavng|gokisharadhavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharadhavya|sharadhavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkya|gosharadhavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharadhavya|gokisharadhavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharadhavyam|sharadhavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkyam|gosharadhavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharadhavyam|gokisharadhavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadhavnĂŒshĂ«|sharadhavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadhavnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharadhavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadhavnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharadhavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadhavnĂŒro|sharadhavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadhavnknĂŒro|gosharadhavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadhavnĂŒro|gokisharadhavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadhavnĂŒmu|sharadhavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadhavnknĂŒmu|gosharadhavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadhavnĂŒmu|gokisharadhavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadhavshĂ«nĂŒ|sharadhavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharadhavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadhavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharadhavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadhavshĂ«ro|sharadhavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkshĂ«ro|gosharadhavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadhavshĂ«ro|gokisharadhavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadhavshĂ«mu|sharadhavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkshĂ«mu|gosharadhavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadhavshĂ«mu|gokisharadhavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadhavronĂŒ|sharadhavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkronĂŒ|gosharadhavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadhavronĂŒ|gokisharadhavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadhavroshĂ«|sharadhavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkroshĂ«|gosharadhavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadhavroshĂ«|gokisharadhavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharadhavromu|sharadhavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkromu|gosharadhavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharadhavromu|gokisharadhavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharadhavmunĂŒ|sharadhavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkmunĂŒ|gosharadhavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharadhavmunĂŒ|gokisharadhavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharadhavmushĂ«|sharadhavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkmushĂ«|gosharadhavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharadhavmushĂ«|gokisharadhavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharadhavmuro|sharadhavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharadhavnkmuro|gosharadhavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharadhavmuro|gokisharadhavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
